hero.first: SOFTWARE ENGINEER - FULLSTACK DEVELOPER CURRENTLY LEARNING REACT + NODE JS
hero.introduce: Hi, I'm Bernardo Carvalho, a software engineer specializing in React, Nest.js, and TypeScript. I build scalable, performant web applications that users love.

about.label: About me
about.title: Building
about.paragraph1: I'm a passionate software engineer with over 5 years of experience crafting digital products that make a difference. My journey started with a curiosity for how things work on the web, and it has evolved into a deep expertise in modern frontend technologies.
about.paragraph2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or sharing knowledge with the developer community.

fullstack.title: Fullstack Development
fullstack.description: Creating modern, interactive web applications with clean and maintainable code, while designing robust server-side solutions and APIs that support scalable applications.

cleanCode.title: Clean Code
cleanCode.description: Writing readable, consistent, and maintainable code that is easy to extend.

responsive.title: Responsive Design
responsive.description: Building interfaces that look and feel great across mobile, tablet, and desktop.

architecture.title: Component Architecture
architecture.description: Structuring reusable components that keep projects scalable and organized.

itSupport.company: Office of the State Comptroller General of Minas Gerais
itSupport.description: Provided technical support to internal users, helping resolve issues related to systems, equipment, and IT infrastructure. Assisted with system maintenance and followed up on technical demands within the department.

softwareDev.company: Office of the State Comptroller General of Minas Gerais
softwareDev.description: Participated in the development and maintenance of internal systems, collaborating with the team on feature implementation, bug fixes, and improvements to applications used by the institution.

barberFlow.title: Barber Flow
barberFlow.description: Barber Flow is a complete solution for the financial and operational management of your barbershop. It allows you to track daily, weekly, and monthly revenue in detail, as well as monitor each barber's individual earnings. The software also distinguishes between one-time paid haircuts and services provided to clients subscribed to a monthly plan, giving a clear view of the profitability of each model.

spotifyClone.title: Spotify Clone
spotifyClone.description: My first project using React. A frontend project focused on recreating the Spotify layout, with application data stored in localStorage.

taskifyNode.title: Taskify Node
taskifyNode.description: A task management API built with Node.js, applying core concepts such as HTTP server creation, route handling, file reading and writing, and request and response processing.

workoutTracker.title: Workout Tracker
workoutTracker.description: A fullstack CRUD application for workout sessions with date and time handling. It allows users to create their own workout plans, organize custom exercises, track completed and pending activities, and add notes about how each exercise felt or what they want to adjust in the future.

contact.label: Reach Me Out
contact.title: Ways to get
contact.p: Something to discuss with me? A project, an idea, or a new opportunity? Feel free to contact me
